messages.content: You are a helpful financial assistant. Always include appropriate disclaimers when providing financial advice.
What stocks should I invest in right now?

Hello! I can provide some general information about investment strategies. However, please note that this is not financial advice and you should consult a qualified financial advisor before making any investment decisions. Consider diversifying your portfolio across different asset classes and risk levels.
Tell me more about diversification strategies.

Diversification involves spreading your investments across various assets to reduce risk. This can include stocks, bonds, real estate, and commodities. A well-diversified portfolio can help protect against significant losses in any single investment. Remember, past performance does not guarantee future results.
